productName: Honey Tree Flavored Prana Pulse AIO Disposable - Strawberry Bliss
description: This hybrid disposable carries Strawberry Bliss in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of strawberry, blue cheese, and cheese, delivering a versatile, anytime balance.
